name: group_config_demo
description: The interesting bits of this scenario live in the sibling _config.json: it sets `default_tags`, a custom `llm_dimensions` entry ('frugality'), and `llm_dimensions_extend_defaults: true`. Run with --modes llm to see the custom dimension scored alongside the four defaults (execution, trajectory, response_quality, efficiency).

turns.message: What is the capital of France? Reply with just the city name on its own line.
